report_name: AI's Dual Impact: Fueling InsurTech Investment While Spurring Liability Exclusions

identities.name: Gallagher Re
identities.description: Author of the Q1 2026 Global InsurTech Report, which highlighted that 95% of InsurTech funding was directed at AI-focused companies.

identities.name: Berkshire Hathaway
identities.description: A major insurance carrier mentioned as adding broad AI liability exclusions to its standard commercial policies in response to a surge in AI-related litigation.
